scaled_oracle_cases.description: Test that function handles None values, mixed types (converting numeric strings), zero MAD (since majority of deviations are zero), and returns sorted values.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The function should ignore None, convert numeric strings to integers, ignore non-numeric strings, correctly compute probabilities when MAD=0, and return sorted fragment lengths.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Input contains None values, numeric strings, non-numeric strings; output must be sorted list of values that meet count and MAD condition.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: A naive solution may crash on None or strings, or not sort output, or mishandle zero MAD.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least one test with None values to ensure they are ignored.
Scaled executable cases must include at least one test with mixed types to ensure proper handling.
Scaled executable cases must include at least one test with identical values to ensure correct handling of zero MAD.
Scaled executable cases must include at least one test that checks the order of the returned values.
